name: Aman Munjal
title: Founder & Lead Trainer
tagline: Clarity-first AI educator for students, engineers, and product leaders
imageAlt: Professional headshot of Aman Munjal, Founder and Lead Trainer at Verlin Labs
bio: Aman Munjal founded Verlin Labs to close the gap between AI hype and real understanding. He designs every program around mental models first — so learners can explain, build, and decide with confidence long after a session ends.

His sessions blend rigorous technical depth with classroom-tested teaching craft. Whether you are in school, engineering college, or leading a product team, Aman meets you at your level and stretches you toward practical mastery.
He leads Verlin Labs' free introductory sessions, full learning tracks, and corporate workshops — always with the same promise: no jargon without explanation, no tools without context.
credentials: Live instructor for free sessions & full programs
Curriculum design across student, engineer, and PM tracks
